about.title: The Value Spine
about.blurb: One shared currency the Coach and GM dashboards both read. Player value has three convertible faces: on-court rating, Wins Above Replacement (WAR), and $/WAR. Team value is roster strength and projected wins. Coach reads it tactically; GM reads it as an asset ledger.

archetype_crosswalk.note: A DEFINED basketball mapping (not a statistical derivation). Player skillsets use a 5-archetype taxonomy; the matchup grid uses a 4-archetype taxonomy. This maps each skillset archetype to its closest matchup archetype so the two Coach views join.

Defensive Anchor.why: the defensive class (grid's only defender axis is perimeter)

notes: Player value currency = WAR (Wins Above Replacement). proj_war_2026 is the age-adjusted forecast; war_2025 is realized.

pp_rating_active is the ACTIVE-ONLY per-possession on-court rating (RAPM-scale, 190 of 208 players). It is shown ONLY for players who are genuinely active in 2026 (>=1 game log with minutes) AND whose rating is computed from real 2026 on-court possessions (not a carried-forward prior). Retired players, coaches, and prior-only/out-all-season players get null -- omit, never a misleading number. This is the honest fix for the v1-dropped raw rating (a naive 'latest rating per player' pull resurfaced Kara Lawson's 2015 and Sylvia Fowles's 2022 ratings). WAR stays the primary currency; the rating is a second, complementary face.
Skill archetypes + component bars come from a 2025 skillset decomposition; players with no 2025 minutes (rookies, some newcomers) show no archetype/bars.
Base salary known for 119 of the ~180 league roster spots; $/WAR shown only where salary and a positive WAR projection both exist. Full multi-year contract structure is a v2 data acquisition.

Roster membership + each player's current team come from the LIVE daily roster feed (all 15 teams, including the 2026 expansion clubs POR/TOR). WAR / skills / salary / rating are joined onto that roster; 141 of 208 rostered players have a 2026 WAR projection. The remaining 67 (expansion newcomers, rookies, players with no 2026 projection yet) are listed with an HONEST null value face -- never a fabricated 0, never silently dropped.
